3. Kindle manuscript: `roofing-search-integrity-report-kdp-manuscript-6x9-v1.0.1.docx`
4. Metadata: `kdp-metadata-v1.0.1.json`

Also included:

- Clean markdown source: `roofing-search-integrity-report-kdp-manuscript-v1.0.1.md`
- Original front cover PNG: `roofing-search-integrity-report-kdp-cover.png`
- Preflight review: `KDP_PREFLIGHT_REVIEW_v1.0.1.md`

Package notes:

- Trim size: 6 x 9 inches
- Interior page count: 34
- Author: Richard Nasser
- Publisher/organization: Inspector Roofing and Restoration
- Version: 1.0.1
